The '''Etti Lighter''', also known as the '''Etti Light Transport''' or '''Authority lighter''', was mid-sized [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] produced and used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

==Characteristics==
Though the 125 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] vessel was equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], in its standard configuration it carried only three days of provisions and was therefore limited to short-range (often intra-system) missions. It could carry up to 400 tons of cargo and was well defended with 10 [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]].

==History==
In remote, low priority systems of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], the [[Security Police/Legends|CSA Security Division]] used [[Etti light cruiser|modified Etti Lighters]], equipped with upgraded power generators and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], as anti-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] patrol craft. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] encountered one of these modified Etti Lighters at [[Duroon]].

The [[Skandrei Bandits]], pirates who operated within the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], operated modified versions of these vessels.
